agents.task_title: Reset mock-player attack-strength in combat gametests
acceptance_criteria: Every combat gametest call site that does player.attack(pig) first resets the player's attack cooldown so that vanilla Player.attack treats the swing as fully charged (multiplier = 1.0, not ~0.2)

The mechanism is either (a) player.resetAttackStrengthTicker() immediately before player.attack(pig), or (b) explicitly setting player.attackStrengthTicker = 100 (well past the weapon's cooldown), or (c) any other approach that guarantees the resulting damage equals base*spec_multiplier within the existing 0.5 tolerance bands

All 6 single-hit combat gametests pass on all 5 MC versions: finesseSprintBonusFires, lightDualWieldBonusFires, versatileEmptyOffhandFires, lanceOnFootHalves, lanceMountedFullDamage, vanillaIronSwordCarriesFinesseHook
./gradlew chiseledRunGametest shows zero AssertionErrors on the 6 combat tests

agents.task_title: Make tooltip gametests work without ItemTooltipCallback
acceptance_criteria: registeredItemTooltipContainsStatBlock and vanillaIronSwordTooltipContainsStatBlock pass on all 5 MC versions in ./gradlew chiseledRunGametest

The chosen approach is one of: (a) Inspect WeaponTooltipBuilder.build(spec) output directly without going through stack.getTooltipLines(), (b) Add a server-aware tooltip-injection mechanism (e.g. a custom DataComponentType set at item registration) so stack.getTooltipLines() returns the injected lines server-side too, (c) Switch these tests to Fabric's client-gametest harness if available in this loom version
The misleading comment in TooltipInjectionGametest.kt line 87 is corrected or deleted

Run the audit grep from phase-3 plan lines 1975-1980 and confirm zero missing keys: tooltip.dndweapons.stat_block, damage_type.slashing, damage_type.piercing, damage_type.bludgeoning, bonus.finesse_sprint, bonus.light_dual, bonus.versatile_empty, bonus.lance_foot
If any keys are missing, add them with reasonable English translations
Document the audit result (zero missing or list of additions) in the cycle-3 verification doc

agents.task_title: Add sweep-behavior gametest and verify runtime correctness of sweep guard
acceptance_criteria: A new gametest is added that places a primary pig and at least one secondary pig within sweep range of the primary
Attacks the primary with greataxe (Heavy property)
Asserts primary pig damage equals base*HeavyMultiplier (within tolerance)
Asserts secondary pig damage equals vanilla sweep damage WITHOUT the Heavy bonus (within tolerance)
The test passes on all 5 MC versions when chiseledRunGametest runs
If the test FAILS, the sweep guard in PlayerAttackMixin's @ModifyArg must be revised with a fallback @Redirect approach if needed

agents.task_title: Create phase-3-combat-hooks git tag once acceptance is green
acceptance_criteria: Tasks 1-3 are complete and ./gradlew chiseledRunGametest shows 9/9 pass per version (45/45 total) AND ./gradlew chiseledTest is green AND ./gradlew chiseledBuild is green
git tag phase-3-combat-hooks is created at the tip of cycle-3 work
The tag is NOT pushed automatically; document the manual push command for the user
phase-3-verification.md from cycle 2 is updated (or a cycle-3 version is generated) showing all 14 spec acceptance criteria GREEN

uncovered_plan_sections: Plan metadata (title, generated date, source bugs report, original plan reference)
